title: plagiobothrys mesembryanthemoides
intro: Plagiobothrys mesembryanthemoides, also known as the small-flowered popcorn flower or small-flowered plagiobothrys, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Consuming the plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health issues.
